title: BYOH Chat Response
description: JSON body returned by POST /chat — the optional interactive chat endpoint on AGENT_CHAT_PORT.

result.description: The assistant's response text. null when an error occurred.

error.description: Human-readable error message if the chat request failed. Omit or set to null on success.

examples.result: The /workspace directory contains: README.md, main.py, requirements.txt

examples.error: LLM proxy returned 429: token budget exhausted
